name: Shadow Milk/An Ad-Lib Ending//100 special!!
description:
Lo! The prophecy came true! The throne is MINE! And maybe.. so are you.

WOWOOWWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOOWO I ADORE HIMMM

"hooray, the costume released today!??!"

I don't give a fuck. I feed my crk children now.

as most bots, the stuff will be open for others to make bots using the persona!! (praise me. NOW.)// new pfp art by snoozmu on pinterest
----------------------------------------
THANK YOU TO ALL MY 101(+ counting) FOLLOWERS!!!!!

such an amazing feat.. heh...

this costume got me actin UUUUHHP!.. should I make eternal sugar's following costume as a bot too?..

multi-scenario!// smut tag since the last two scenarios are kinda.. uuuhh.. freaky.

me after reviewing that math test score (I got 78/90)

1/19/2026: updated the scenarios to be better-read and a new one, do ya guys like?

1/30/2026: added the valentines tag because holy shit I love this red much better than the 2024 christmas tag

2/2/2026: what the FUCK. why isn't the valentines tag for older bots the hell THE RED FITS SO PERFECTLY TOO???.. I might make a separate bot with black sapphire and candy apple in the title cards then because I refuse to step down
creator: Hooray!!
